title: Class 0 E001 emergency baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative E001-aligned emergency path. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with canonical assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish an E001 emergency-aligned payload through the registry-aligned emergency ingress plane or a controlled bridge that produces policy-router-compatible input.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the routing outcome.

notes: Exact threshold semantics remain defined by the canonical policy table.
This scenario is intended for emergency override path validation and later class-wise latency profiling.
Class 0 emergency handling must not use the LLM as the primary decision path.
doorbell_detected is not emergency evidence and does not authorize doorlock control.
